sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n6796" key="a)nakrate/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνακρατέω</orth>, <sense id="n6796.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hold up, support,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:1:114" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.114</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
